Sutherlandia frutescens, commonly known as Cancer Bush or Ogcodeia (incorrect name), is a shrub-like plant native to Southern Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Sutherlandia frutescens has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as HIV/AIDS, cancer, and cardiovascular diseases.
